arts.ttl: Man City handed FFP charges case truth after Premier League hearing 'leaks' emerge
arts.sum: Manchester City are going toe-to-toe with the Premier League over historic FFP allegations and their hearing in London started this week.

arts.ttl: Video: Inter fans march ahead of Manchester City clash
arts.sum: Inter ultras are marching towards the Etihad Stadium for tonight’s Champions League showdown with Manchester...

arts.ttl: Are tonight's Celtic and Man City Champions League games on Amazon?
arts.sum: Both Amazon Prime Video and TNT Sports have live broadcasting rights for European football's premier competition

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Inter Milan - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as Premier League winners kick off their European campaign in repeat of 2023 final
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Champions League clash between Man City and Inter Milan as we provide you with all the build-up, team news and live action from the Etihad.

arts.ttl: William Saliba sends Erling Haaland timely reminder ahead of Man City vs Arsenal clash
arts.sum: William Saliba is looking to stop Erling Haaland in his tracks when Arsenal travel to Manchester City in their early Premier League title showdown on Sunday but first up for the Gunners is a trip to Atalanta in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Man City vs Inter Milan LIVE: Champions League team news and line-ups from Etihad Stadium tonight
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s team hope to kick off their European campaign with a win at home

arts.ttl: Man City vs Inter Milan LIVE! Champions League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Rematch of the 2023 final in new-look league phase

arts.ttl: Inter Milan pushed Man City all the way in last year's Champions League final - and now they're even better... How Simone Inzaghi took his side to the next level and the Ballon d'Or contender Pep Guardiola must be wary of tonight
arts.sum: As they head over to British soil, revenge will be on Inter's minds, and they may just get it. After all, Inter are an even better side than the last time these two teams met.

arts.ttl: Man City get confidence boost as bid to take Champions League back from Real Madrid begins
arts.sum: Opta have devised a global team ranking system that assigns an ability score to more than 13,000 domestic football teams, on a scale between zero and 100, where zero is the worst-ranked team in the world and 100 is the best

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Man City will NOT be wearing their home strip against Inter Milan as Pep Guardiola's side embark on their Champions League campaign
arts.sum: Manchester City will kick-start their Champions League campaign against reigning Italian champions Inter Milan on Wednesday evening, but won't be wearing their usual home kit at the Etihad.
